codeReview.summary: The fix properly addresses the blocking issue by wiring SummaryService into the end_session router. When end_session is called without a manual summary, it now automatically calls summary_service.generate_and_store_summary() to generate an AI-powered summary, then refreshes the session to return the updated summary.

summary: Fix successfully addresses VAL-SESSION-006. The end_session router now automatically triggers summary generation via SummaryService when no manual summary is provided. The fix adds summary_service as a dependency and calls generate_and_store_summary() after ending the session, then refreshes the session to return the updated summary. All 156 tests pass.
